content: write an email to my manager saying I will be late

Here's a simple email:

Subject: Notification of Expected Late Arrival

Dear [Manager's Name],

I am writing to inform you that I will be late to work today. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will make every effort to arrive as soon as possible.

I expect to arrive at [estimated arrival time]. If there are any pressing matters that I need to attend to as soon as I arrive, please let me know.

Thank you for your understanding.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

Would you like me to add or change anything?

Here's the revised email:

Subject: Notification of Expected Late Arrival

Dear [Manager's Name],

I am writing to inform you that I will be late to work today. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will make every effort to arrive as soon as possible.

I expect to arrive at [estimated arrival time]. If there are any pressing matters that I need to attend to as soon as I arrive, please let me know.

Thank you for your understanding.

Sincerely,
Bobby

To complete the email, I need to know your manager's name and your estimated arrival time. Can you please provide that information?
